steps.t: Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should enter Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Múta in Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should defeat Claghórd in Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Múta in the upper reaches of Tûr Fúar.
